## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1.
2.

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include tmux status bar screenshot if possible.

## Environment

- **tmux**: (e.g., 3.4 — run `tmux -V`)
- **marmonitor**: (e.g., 0.1.3 — run `marmonitor --version`)
- **tpm**: installed? (check `~/.tmux/plugins/tpm`)
- **OS**: (e.g., macOS 14.3, Ubuntu 22.04)
- **Shell**: (e.g., zsh, bash)

## Custom Options

List any `@marmonitor-*` options you've set in tmux.conf:

```
set -g @marmonitor-format '...'
set -g @marmonitor-attention-key '...'
```
